case_title: GERALD NG VS. HOWARD MAC et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ERIK L. PETERSON, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-16-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DEBORAH LUBIN, CSR #3234. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO OSC RE:SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, GERALD AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF KIM JOK NG
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-16-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-01-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, GERALD AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF KIM JOK NG AS TO DEFENDANT MAC, HOWARD HWA, MAC MINH DA, MIN DOES 1 TO 50 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-01-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-03-2002
